    <scriptTask id="ScriptTask_1meknce" name="Check INIT" scriptFormat="javascript" activiti:async="false" activiti:exclusive="false" activiti:autoStoreVariables="false">
      <incoming>SequenceFlow_0bxieqw</incoming>
      <outgoing>SequenceFlow_0gv99l5</outgoing>
      <script><![CDATA[try {

    var jsonTemplate = JSON.parse(execution.getVariable('template'));
    execution.setVariable('odooEndpoint', jsonTemplate.odooEndpoint);
    execution.setVariable('b2wEndpoint', jsonTemplate.b2wEndpoint);
    execution.setVariable('tenantId', jsonTemplate.tenantId);
    execution.setVariable('orgToken', jsonTemplate.orgToken);
    execution.setVariable("cartB2WEndpoint", jsonTemplate.cartB2WEndpoint);

    var accessToken = execution.getVariable('X-Auth-Request-Access-Token');
    if (!accessToken) {
        var request = JSON.parse(execution.getVariable('request'));
        accessToken = request['X-Auth-Request-Access-Token'];
    }
    execution.setVariable('token', accessToken);

    var commodity = execution.getVariable('commodity');
    var is_email_required = (commodity && commodity === "gas");
    execution.setVariable("is_email_required", is_email_required);

    execution.setVariable("showToast", false);
    execution.setVariable("toastMessage", '');

    execution.setVariable('SL', 'sede_legale');
    execution.setVariable('SedeL', 'Sede Legale');
    execution.setVariable('category_company', 'company');
    execution.setVariable('category_individual', 'individual');

    var is_individual_client = execution.getVariable('is_individual_client');

    if (is_individual_client === true || is_individual_client === "true") {
        is_individual_client = true;
    } else {
        is_individual_client = false;
    }

    execution.setVariable('is_individual_client', is_individual_client);

    if (!is_individual_client) {
        execution.setVariable('customer_group', 'private');
        execution.setVariable(
            'customer_group_options',
            JSON.stringify([
                { text: "PA", value: "pa" },
                { text: "ORGANIZZAZIONE", value: "private" }
            ])
        );
    }

    var customerCareMap = {
        "std": { text: "STD", value: "std" },
        "pmi": { text: "PMI", value: "pmi" },
        "top": { text: "TOP", value: "top" },
        "supervip": { text: "SUPERVIP", value: "supervip" },
        "ade": { text: "AdE", value: "ade" },
        "cfa": { text: "CFA", value: "cfa" }
    };

    var customer_care_category_raw = execution.getVariable('customer_care_category');
    var customer_care_category = customerCareMap[customer_care_category_raw] || null;

    execution.setVariable(
        "customer_care_category",
        JSON.stringify(customer_care_category)
    );

    var is_std_vip = false;
    var is_top_pmi_vip = false;

    if (!is_individual_client && customer_care_category) {
        if (
            customer_care_category.value === "top" ||
            customer_care_category.value === "supervip" ||
            customer_care_category.value === "pmi"
        ) {
            is_top_pmi_vip = true;
        }
    }
    else if (is_individual_client && customer_care_category) {
        if (
            customer_care_category.value === "std" ||
            customer_care_category.value === "supervip"
        ) {
            is_std_vip = true;
        }
    }

    execution.setVariable("is_std_vip", is_std_vip);
    execution.setVariable("is_top_pmi_vip", is_top_pmi_vip);

    execution.setVariable("individualBusinessType", "PFRES");
    execution.setVariable("state_code", "ML-AN02-1-006");

} catch (err) {
    execution.setVariable('isAlive', false);
    execution.setVariable('errorCode', 'TEMPLATE_FAILED');
    execution.setVariable('errorMessage', err.message);
}
]]></script>

    <scriptTask id="ScriptTask_1a8ria0" name="Check Addresses" scriptFormat="javascript" activiti:async="false" activiti:exclusive="false" activiti:autoStoreVariables="false">
      <incoming>SequenceFlow_0jg3l6b</incoming>
      <outgoing>SequenceFlow_1o4dw23</outgoing>
      <script><![CDATA[try{ 
	var jsonResponse = JSON.parse(execution.getVariable('getAddressesResponse'));
	
	var isAlive = true;
	var errorCode = '0';
	var errorMessage = '';
	
	var showToast = false;
	var toastMessage = '';
	var toastStatus = 'error';
	
	var find_legal_sede = false;
	
	if(jsonResponse.code == 200){
		if (jsonResponse.body){
			var body = JSON.parse(jsonResponse.body);

			for (var i = 0; i < body.length; i++) {
				if (body[i].address_type == "sede_legale") {
				
					find_legal_sede = true;
					
					execution.setVariable('old_toponym', body[i].toponym_id[0]);
					execution.setVariable('old_street', body[i].street);
					execution.setVariable('old_street_num', body[i].street_num);
					execution.setVariable('old_state_id', body[i].state_id[0]);
					execution.setVariable('old_city_id', body[i].city_id[0]);
					execution.setVariable('old_zip', body[i].zip);
					execution.setVariable('old_id', body[i].id);
					
					execution.setVariable('new_toponym', body[i].toponym_id[0]);
					execution.setVariable('new_street', body[i].street);
					execution.setVariable('new_street_num', body[i].street_num);
					execution.setVariable('new_state_id', body[i].state_id[0]);
					execution.setVariable('new_city_id', body[i].city_id[0]);
					execution.setVariable('new_zip', body[i].zip);
					execution.setVariable('new_id', body[i].id);
                    execution.setVariable('egon_city_id', body[i].egon_city_id);
                    execution.setVariable('egon_street_id', body[i].egon_street_id);
                    execution.setVariable('egon_house_number_id', body[i].egon_house_number_id);
					
					if (body[i].parcel_type) {
						execution.setVariable('old_parcel_type', body[i].parcel_type);
						execution.setVariable('parcel_type', body[i].parcel_type);
					}
					
					if (body[i].missing_cadastral_reason) {
						execution.setVariable('new_cadastral_reason', body[i].missing_cadastral_reason);
						execution.setVariable('old_cadastral_reason', body[i].missing_cadastral_reason);
					}
					
					break;

				} 
			}
		}
	}else{
		isAlive = false;
		errorCode = 'GET_ADDRESS_FROM_PARTNER_FAILED';
		errorMessage = 'Service is unavailable';
	}
			
	if (find_legal_sede) {
		execution.setVariable('find_legal_sede', true);
	} else {
		execution.setVariable('find_legal_sede', false);
		showToast = true;
		toastMessage = 'Non e stata trovata alcuna sede legale. Compila il form per crearne uno.';
		toastStatus = 'warning';
	}
	
	execution.setVariable("showToast", showToast);
	execution.setVariable("toastMessage", toastMessage);
	execution.setVariable("toastStatus", toastStatus);
	
	execution.setVariable("isAlive", isAlive);
	execution.setVariable("errorCode", errorCode);
	execution.setVariable("errorMessage", errorMessage);

}catch(err){ 
	execution.setVariable("isAlive",false);
	execution.setVariable('errorCode','PAYLOAD_GET_ADDRESS_FROM_PARTNER_FAILED');
	execution.setVariable('errorMessage',err.message);
}]]></script>
    </scriptTask>

    <scriptTask id="ScriptTask_12afnlk" name="Check Empty VAT" scriptFormat="javascript" activiti:async="false" activiti:exclusive="false" activiti:autoStoreVariables="false">
      <incoming>SequenceFlow_1pgs0tu</incoming>
      <outgoing>SequenceFlow_1u7lp3s</outgoing>
      <script><![CDATA[try{ 
	var validData = true;
	var showToast = false;
	var toastMessage = '';

    var is_individual_client = execution.getVariable('is_individual_client');
    var phone = execution.getVariable('phone');
    var mobile = execution.getVariable('mobile');
    
	var client_cf = execution.getVariable('fiscal_code');
        var client_piva = execution.getVariable('vat');
        var validFirstCharacters = ['7', '8', '9'
    ]
        var is_individual_client = execution.getVariable('is_individual_client');
	if(!client_piva && validFirstCharacters.indexOf(client_cf.charAt(0)) == -1 && !is_individual_client){		
		validData = false;
		showToast = true;
		toastMessage = "La Partita IVA e' obbligatoria per i codici fiscali che non iniziano per 7, 8 o 9";
    }

    if (is_individual_client) {
        if (!phone && !mobile) {
            validData = false;
            showToast = true;
            toastMessage = "E' obbligatorio specificare il telefono o il cellulare per le persone fisiche";
        }
    }
	
    execution.setVariable('validData',validData);
	execution.setVariable('showToast',showToast);
	execution.setVariable('toastMessage',toastMessage);
}catch(err){ 
    execution.setVariable('validData',false);
	execution.setVariable("isAlive",false);
	execution.setVariable('errorCode','CF_INITIALS_CHECK_FAILED');
	execution.setVariable('errorMessage',err.message);
}]]></script>

    <scriptTask id="ScriptTask_064c0qw" name="Check n of Changes" scriptFormat="javascript" activiti:async="false" activiti:exclusive="false" activiti:autoStoreVariables="false">
      <incoming>SequenceFlow_0lxejfd</incoming>
      <outgoing>SequenceFlow_1a57ryb</outgoing>
      <script><![CDATA[try {
  var version = java.lang.System.getProperty("java.version");
  if (version.startsWith("1.8.0")) {
    load("nashorn:mozilla_compat.js");
    }

  importClass(org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils);

  var find_legal_sede = execution.getVariable('find_legal_sede');
  var is_new_sede = execution.getVariable('is_new_sede');
  var initial_mobile = execution.getVariable('initial_mobile');
  var initial_email = execution.getVariable('initial_email');
  var client_email = execution.getVariable('email');

  if (!is_new_sede) {
    is_new_sede = false; //Force false if we receive a null or empty
    }

  var address_changed = false;

  var callSII = false;
  var new_address = false;

  if (find_legal_sede) {

    if (is_new_sede) {

      address_changed = true;
      callSII = true;
        }

    var old_parcel_type = execution.getVariable('old_parcel_type');
    var new_parcel_type = execution.getVariable('parcel_type');

    if (old_parcel_type && new_parcel_type) {
      if (old_parcel_type != new_parcel_type) {
        address_changed = true;
            }
        }

    if (!old_parcel_type && new_parcel_type) {
      address_changed = true;
        }

    var old_cadastral_reason = execution.getVariable('old_cadastral_reason');
    var new_cadastral_reason = execution.getVariable('new_cadastral_reason');

    if (old_cadastral_reason && new_cadastral_reason) {
      if (old_cadastral_reason != new_cadastral_reason) {
        address_changed = true;
            }
        }

    if (!old_cadastral_reason && new_cadastral_reason) {
      address_changed = true;
        }
    } else {
    address_changed = true;
    }

  execution.setVariable('address_changed', address_changed);
  execution.setVariable('is_new_sede', is_new_sede);


  var old_cf = execution.getVariable('old_fiscal_code');
  var new_cf = execution.getVariable('fiscal_code');
  
  if (old_cf && old_cf.value) old_cf = old_cf.value;
  if (new_cf && new_cf.value) new_cf = new_cf.value;

  var is_individual_client = execution.getVariable('is_individual_client');
  var new_piva = execution.getVariable('vat');

  var showToast = false;
  var toastMessage = '';
  var validData = true;

  if (!new_cf) {
    showToast = true;
    validData = false;
    toastMessage = "Le codice fiscale non e stato trovato";
    } else if (!old_cf) {
    showToast = true;
    validData = false;
    toastMessage = "Hai modificato piu di 5 caratteri del codice fiscale. Necessario eseguire Voltura"
    } else {

    var distCf = StringUtils.getLevenshteinDistance(String(old_cf), String(new_cf));

    if (distCf > 0) {
      callSII = true;
        }
    if (is_individual_client) {
      if (distCf > 3) {
        showToast = true;
        validData = false;
        toastMessage = "Hai modificato piu di 3 caratteri del codice fiscale di una persona fisica. Necessario eseguire Voltura"
            }
        } else {
      if (!new_piva && distCf > 0) {
        showToast = true;
        validData = false;
        toastMessage = "Hai modificato il codice fiscale. Necessario eseguire Voltura"
            }
        }
    }

  var new_phone = execution.getVariable('phone');
  var old_phone = execution.getVariable('initial_phone');
  var new_mobile = execution.getVariable('mobile');
  var old_mobile = execution.getVariable('initial_mobile');
  if (!new_phone && !new_mobile) {
    showToast = true;
    validData = false;
    toastMessage = "Inserire uno tra Telefono e Cellulare, o entrambi"
    }

  var new_name = execution.getVariable('name');
  var old_name = execution.getVariable('old_name');
  var new_is_pmi = execution.getVariable('new_is_pmi');
  var old_is_pmi = execution.getVariable('is_pmi');

  if (!new_is_pmi) {
        //Force false if we receive a null or empty
    new_is_pmi = false;
    }

  if ((new_name != old_name) || (new_phone != old_phone) || (new_is_pmi != old_is_pmi)) {
    callSII = true;
    }
  if ((is_new_sede || initial_mobile != new_mobile) || (new_phone != old_phone) || (initial_email != client_email)) {
    new_address = true;
    }
    //   allowed_phase_results = execution.getVariable('allowed_phase_results');
    state_code = 'ML-AN02-1-006'

  execution.setVariable('state_code', state_code);
  execution.setVariable('callSII', callSII);
  execution.setVariable('new_address', new_address);

  execution.setVariable('status', 'SUCCESS');
  execution.setVariable("showToast", showToast);
  execution.setVariable("toastMessage", toastMessage);
  execution.setVariable("validData", validData);
} catch (err) {
  execution.setVariable("validData", false);
  execution.setVariable("isAlive", false);
  execution.setVariable('errorCode', 'CHECK_PIVA_OR_CF_FAILED');
  execution.setVariable('errorMessage', err.message);
}]]></script>

 }catch(err){

      <script><![CDATA[try { 
	var validCF = true;
	var showToast = false;
	var toastMessage = '';

	var jsonResponse = JSON.parse(execution.getVariable('individualCFResponse'));
	var fiscal_code = execution.getVariable('fiscal_code'); // <-- recupero della variabile

	if (jsonResponse.code == 200) {
		
		var body = JSON.parse(jsonResponse.body);
		
		if (body.result == 'KO') {
			validCF = false;
			showToast = true;
			toastMessage = 'Il codice fiscale [' + fiscal_code + '] non è valido: ' + body.message;

	} else {

		showToast = true;
		toastMessage = 'Il codice fiscale [' + fiscal_code + '] non è formalmente corretto';
	}
	
	execution.setVariable('validCF', validCF);
	execution.setVariable('showToast', showToast);
	execution.setVariable('toastMessage', toastMessage);

} catch (err) { 
	execution.setVariable('validCF', false);
	execution.setVariable('isAlive', false);
	execution.setVariable('errorCode', 'CONT_CF_FAILED');
	execution.setVariable('errorMessage', err.message);
}]]></script>

    }

    <scriptTask id="ScriptTask_19iteh5" name="Check Get Selections" scriptFormat="javascript" activiti:async="false" activiti:exclusive="false" activiti:autoStoreVariables="false">
      <incoming>SequenceFlow_1qfxrcb</incoming>
      <outgoing>SequenceFlow_02kg63j</outgoing>
      <script><![CDATA[try {
    var jsonResponse = JSON.parse(execution.getVariable('getSelectionsResponse'));

    var isAlive = true;
    var errorCode = '0';
    var errorMessage = '';

    var showToast = false;
    var toastMessage = '';
    var toastStatus = 'error';

    var is_individual_client = execution.getVariable("is_individual_client")
    var customer_care_category = JSON.parse(execution.getVariable("customer_care_category")).value

    if (jsonResponse.code == 200) {
        if (jsonResponse.body) {
            var body = JSON.parse(jsonResponse.body);

            var allowed = [
                "TOP",
                "PMI",
                "SUPERVIP",
                "STD"
            ];
            var filtered_customer_care_category = [];

            for (var i = 0; i < body.customer_care_category.length; i++) {
              if (allowed.indexOf(body.customer_care_category[i
                ].text) !== -1) {
                filtered_customer_care_category.push(body.customer_care_category[i
                    ]);
                }
            }

            if (is_individual_client) {
                if (customer_care_category == "std") {
                    filtered_customer_care_category = [
                        {
                            "text": "SUPERVIP",
                            "value": "supervip"
                        }
                    ]
                }

                if (customer_care_category == "supervip") {
                    filtered_customer_care_category = [
                        {
                            "text": "STD",
                            "value": "std"
                        }
                    ]
                }
            } else {
                if (customer_care_category == "supervip") {
                    filtered_customer_care_category = [
                        {
                            "text": "TOP",
                            "value": "top"
                        },
                        {
                            "text": "PMI",
                            "value": "pmi"
                        }
                    ]
                }

                if (customer_care_category == "top") {
                    filtered_customer_care_category = [
                        {
                            "text": "SUPERVIP",
                            "value": "supervip"
                        },
                        {
                            "text": "PMI",
                            "value": "pmi"
                        }
                    ]
                }

                if (customer_care_category == "pmi") {
                    filtered_customer_care_category = [
                        {
                            "text": "SUPERVIP",
                            "value": "supervip"
                        },
                        {
                            "text": "TOP",
                            "value": "top"
                        }
                    ]
                }
            }



            execution.setVariable("gender_options", JSON.stringify(body.gender))
            execution.setVariable("customer_care_category_options", JSON.stringify(filtered_customer_care_category))
            execution.setVariable("category_options", JSON.stringify(body.category))
            execution.setVariable("business_type_options", JSON.stringify(body.business_type))
            execution.setVariable("identification_type_options", JSON.stringify(body.identification_type))
            execution.setVariable("company_group_options", JSON.stringify(body.company_group))
            execution.setVariable("employees_count_options", JSON.stringify(body.employees_count))
            execution.setVariable("annual_revenue_options", JSON.stringify(body.annual_revenue))
            execution.setVariable("company_group_options", JSON.stringify(body.company_group))
        }
    } else {
        isAlive = false;
        errorCode = 'GET_SELECTIONS_FAILED';
        errorMessage = 'Service is unavailable';
    }

    execution.setVariable("showToast", showToast);
    execution.setVariable("toastMessage", toastMessage);
    execution.setVariable("toastStatus", toastStatus);

    execution.setVariable("isAlive", isAlive);
    execution.setVariable("errorCode", errorCode);
    execution.setVariable("errorMessage", errorMessage);
} catch (err) {
    execution.setVariable("isAlive", false);
    execution.setVariable('errorCode', 'GET_SELECTIONS_FAILED');
    execution.setVariable('errorMessage', err.message);
}]]></script>
    </scriptTask>
